summary: UI Polish Testing Complete: Bottom tab bar and Messages empty state improvements verified. All 12 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: BottomTabBar.js - 64px height tab bar with 5 tabs (Home, Explore, My Case, Messages, Profile)
VERIFIED: Active tab shows filled icon (fill='currentColor'), gold indicator bar (bg-[#D4B36A]), and bold label
VERIFIED: Inactive tabs show 50% opacity (rgba(11,11,13,0.5)) icons and semibold labels
VERIFIED: My Case tab has prominent circular icon container (w-11 h-11 rounded-full)
VERIFIED: Tab navigation works correctly - each tab navigates to correct page
VERIFIED: MessagesSection - RM info card with name, role, and Online badge (emerald-500 green)
VERIFIED: Empty state shows RM avatar with gold gradient circle (from-[#D4B36A] to-[#C4A030]) and green online dot
VERIFIED: Empty state shows '[RM first name] is ready to help' heading
VERIFIED: 3 quick-start suggestion chips that populate input field when clicked
VERIFIED: Send button turns gold (bg-[#D4B36A]) when text entered, gray (bg-[#0B0B0D]/10) when empty
VERIFIED: Case detail page loads with Overview/Messages/Shared/Payments/Timeline tabs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo customer data
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI polish improvements verified. Bottom tab bar now has 64px height, heavier icons (filled active, thicker stroke), bolder labels (10px semibold), stronger contrast (50% inactive opacity), gold bar indicator, and prominent My Case circular icon. Messages empty state has premium RM card with online badge, warm empty state with gold RM avatar + green online dot, 'RM is ready to help' heading, quick-start suggestion chips, gold-accented send button, and personalized placeholder.
